tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: If it _______ tomorrow, we'll cancel the picnic.
You _______ have told me earlier — now it's too late.
If I had studied harder, I _______ the exam.
She _______ be at home — her car is in the driveway.
You _______ touch that wire. It's very dangerous.
If only I _______ more free time to travel.
He _______ swim when he was just four years old.
Unless you _______ now, you'll miss the train.
You _______ wear a suit. It's a casual event.
If she _______ the truth, she wouldn't have been so upset.
